title: Real-World Evaluation of Two Cooperative Intersection Management Approaches
authors: Marvin Klimke; Max Bastian Mertens; Benjamin Volz; Michael Buchholz
method_family: Real-world cooperative maneuver planning evaluation / 真实道路协同机动规划评估

textbook_study_path: 第一遍先读首页截图、摘要与引言，确认研究问题和场景假设。
第二遍沿着技术路线图复现模型变量、约束和求解器输入输出。
第三遍逐节阅读 section deep reading，对照 PDF 截图检查公式、图表和实验。
第四遍只站在审稿人视角重读实验，判断 baseline、公平性、消融和鲁棒性。
最后把博士 checklist 写成自己的复现实验或论文拓展计划。

section_deep_reading.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 建立研究动机：为什么传统信号控制、FCFS 或单车控制不足以处理该论文关注的交叉口协同问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Understand why the paper needs a new coordination method rather than a standard signal, FCFS, or single-vehicle controller.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这一部分通常把痛点落到 Real-world cooperative intersection management：既要提高效率，又要保持安全与在线可执行。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 精读时标出作者批判的 baseline、场景假设、交通参与者类型和隐含优化目标。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 作者指出的痛点是否真的需要新方法，还是可以由更强的优化器/更保守规则解决？

section_deep_reading.heading: 2 REAL-WORLD EV ALUATION OF TWO COOPERATIVE INTERSECTION MANAGEMENT APPROACHES
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 解释算法如何把模型转化为可执行决策，并说明在线运行机制。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Trace how the paper turns the model into executable online decisions.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 论文不是提出单一新控制算法，而是比较多场景预测和图强化学习等协同机动规划模块，在混合交通仿真与真实车辆中评估停车、时间和关键性。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 画出输入、核心求解器、输出和安全检查接口，明确哪些步骤是优化、哪些是规则、哪些是学习。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 若算法某一步失败，论文有没有 fallback、重规划或安全过滤机制？

section_deep_reading.heading: II. RELATEDWORK
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 建立方法谱系和相关工作边界，避免把本文贡献误读为完全从零开始。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Place the paper inside the broader method taxonomy.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 该部分说明作者站在哪些已有工作之上，以及本文选择绕开或继承了哪些限制。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 把相关工作按 scheduler、smoother、safety filter、evaluation 四类重排。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 作者是否公平比较了最接近的强 baseline？

section_deep_reading.heading: III. COOPERATIVEMANEUVERPLANNINGMODULES
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 承接前后章节，补充局部定义、案例或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Recover implementation details needed for reproduction.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这类章节常常不是主贡献，但决定你能否真正复现方法。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 检查它是否给出了参数、伪代码、场景划分或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 跳过该节会不会导致公式或实验无法复现？

section_deep_reading.heading: V. SIMULATIONEVALUATIONRESULTS
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 验证方法是否在公平基准下改善效率、安全、能耗或计算时间。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Check whether the claimed improvements are supported by fair baselines and meaningful metrics.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 实验应与论文声称的贡献闭环：Novel mixed-traffic simulation framework plus real-world prototype connected automated vehicle drives.
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 重点追踪指标：穿越时间、停车次数、关键性/风险、成功率和真实系统运行稳定性。 同时检查仿真平台、交通需求和随机性设置。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 实验是否只展示平均收益，还是覆盖了高密度、异常扰动和失败案例？

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 先把作者的痛点翻译成一句博士问题：协同交叉口管理方法在混合交通仿真与真实原型车测试中是否仍能减少停车和通行时间？ 读这一段时不要急着接受动机，要追问传统 FCFS、信号灯或保守 MPC 为什么不足。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Turn the opening motivation into one doctoral-level question and test whether the paper truly needs a new method.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Assumption and setting / 假设与场景段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把车辆类型、通信条件、路口类型和动力学假设列成表。该文的关键边界包括：原型系统中的通信与感知可支持协同机动规划。；真实测试场景代表性足以支持初步结论。；关键性指标可近似反映真实安全风险。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: List vehicle type, communication, intersection setting, and dynamics assumptions before reading the equations.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Model and notation / 模型与符号段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 围绕核心公式“评估指标聚合 / Evaluation-metric aggregation”复写符号表，确认每个变量是决策变量、状态变量、参数还是约束阈值。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Rewrite the symbol table around the core formulation and classify variables as states, decisions, parameters, or constraints.

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把算法读成一条数据流：输入交通状态，执行 Compares multi-scenario prediction and graph-based reinforcement learning approaches in mixed-traffic simulation and real drives.，输出可执行通行/控制决策，并检查安全接口。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Read the algorithm as a dataflow from traffic state to executable sequence/control decision, with explicit safety interfaces.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Experiment and evidence / 实验证据段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 不要只看作者报告的提升，要检查基准、公平性和指标。本文验证描述为：Novel mixed-traffic simulation framework plus real-world prototype connected automated vehicle drives.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Go beyond reported gains and inspect baselines, fairness, metrics, and computation time.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Reviewer synthesis / 审稿式总结段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 最后把贡献拆成可发表与需补强两部分。对你课题最直接的用途是：Excellent evidence that stop count is a practical metric and that real-world mixed traffic should be considered in future validation.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Separate publishable contribution from missing evidence, then connect the result to your own thesis architecture.

technical_route.content: 车辆状态、路径/车道、交通需求、信号或协同信息。
评估指标聚合 / Evaluation-metric aggregation
Compares multi-scenario prediction and graph-based reinforcement learning approaches in mixed-traffic simulation and real drives.
Evaluates criticality metrics while operating with prototype connected automated vehicles in public traffic.
Reports substantial reductions in crossing time and number of stops for cooperative maneuver planning.
Novel mixed-traffic simulation framework plus real-world prototype connected automated vehicle drives.

contribution_matrix.comment: 评估指标聚合 / Evaluation-metric aggregation
Compares multi-scenario prediction and graph-based reinforcement learning approaches in mixed-traffic simulation and real drives.
Novel mixed-traffic simulation framework plus real-world prototype connected automated vehicle drives.
Evaluates criticality metrics while operating with prototype connected automated vehicles in public traffic.

contribution_matrix.dimension: 博士课题价值 / PhD relevance
contribution_matrix.comment: Excellent evidence that stop count is a practical metric and that real-world mixed traffic should be considered in future validation.

doctoral_checklist: 能否独立重写核心公式：评估指标聚合 / Evaluation-metric aggregation，并解释每个符号的物理意义？
能否画出输入-模型-算法-控制-验证的数据流图？
能否指出至少两个强假设，并说明它们在真实交通中何时失效？
能否复述实验基准是否公平，指标是否覆盖效率、安全、能耗和计算时间？
能否提出一个与自己 JSSP/RL/smoother 课题直接相连的拓展实验？

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“Real-world cooperative intersection management”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of Real-world cooperative intersection management. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: Focuses on cooperative maneuver planning evaluation, not a JSSP formulation.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: 协同交叉口管理方法在混合交通仿真与真实原型车测试中是否仍能减少停车和通行时间？
overview.core_question_en: Do cooperative intersection-management approaches reduce stops and crossing time in both mixed-traffic simulation and real prototype drives?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Compares multi-scenario prediction and graph-based reinforcement learning approaches in mixed-traffic simulation and real drives.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Evaluates criticality metrics while operating with prototype connected automated vehicles in public traffic.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：Reports substantial reductions in crossing time and number of stops for cooperative maneuver planning.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：强验证价值：真实道路评估稀缺，是论文实验设计和指标选择的优质参考。

methodology.model_name: 评估指标聚合 / Evaluation-metric aggregation
symbols: 衡量 stop avoidance 的直接指标
仿真或真实试验样本量
methodology.algorithm_zh: 论文不是提出单一新控制算法，而是比较多场景预测和图强化学习等协同机动规划模块，在混合交通仿真与真实车辆中评估停车、时间和关键性。
methodology.algorithm_en: Rather than only proposing a controller, the paper evaluates cooperative maneuver-planning modules in simulation and real-world prototype drives.
methodology.stability_zh: 贡献在验证闭环：真实车辆实验暴露通信、定位、感知和人类交通干扰。它为仿真论文提供“哪些指标必须走向真实”的标尺。
methodology.stability_en: Its value is validation realism: real drives reveal communication, localization, perception, and mixed-traffic issues hidden in pure simulation.
assumptions: 原型系统中的通信与感知可支持协同机动规划。
真实测试场景代表性足以支持初步结论。
关键性指标可近似反映真实安全风险。

experiments.validation: Novel mixed-traffic simulation framework plus real-world prototype connected automated vehicle drives.
experiments.baselines: 不同协同机动规划模块、非协同驾驶、仿真基线和真实驾驶对照。
experiments.metrics: 穿越时间、停车次数、关键性/风险、成功率和真实系统运行稳定性。
experiments.ablation: 作为评估论文，模块消融不一定充分；最需要的是同一交通需求下的模块替换、传感器/通信降级和 HDV 行为差异测试。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。
检查状态、动作、奖励、经验回放和安全惩罚是否闭环一致。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 样本规模和场景覆盖通常小于大规模仿真。
不是 JSSP 建模论文，理论调度贡献有限。
真实测试条件可能较温和，极端场景不足。
extensions: 把你的 JSSP scheduler 输出转化为相同停车/穿越时间/关键性指标，形成可对标实验。
设计 sim-to-real gap 表格：仿真中通过的策略在真实系统中哪些环节会失效。
加入通信延迟、定位噪声和 HDV 插入，复现实验鲁棒性。
critique.project_use: Excellent evidence that stop count is a practical metric and that real-world mixed traffic should be considered in future validation.

interactive.response_zh: 延迟上升会降低协同收益，并增加保守安全缓冲。
interactive.response_en: Higher latency reduces coordination benefit and increases safety buffers.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
左侧目录/section navigator，右侧为五大精读模块。
公式卡片使用 <pre> 或 LaTeX block，紧跟符号表。
审稿人批注用 reviewer-note block，博士拓展用 research-idea list。
交互参数用 input[type=range] + canvas 曲线，打印 PDF 时隐藏交互控件但保留解释。
